title: Cargo Lints
description: Lint settings for Cargo individual lints and lint groups.

blanket_hint_mostly_unused.title: Blanket Hint Mostly Unused
blanket_hint_mostly_unused.description: Checks if `hint-mostly-unused` is being applied to all dependencies.

implicit_minimum_version_req.title: Implicit Minimum Version Req
implicit_minimum_version_req.description: Checks for dependency version requirements that do not explicitly specify a full `major.minor.patch` version requirement.

unknown_lints.title: Unknown Lints
unknown_lints.description: Checks for unknown lints in the `[lints.cargo]` table.

complexity.title: Complexity
complexity.description: Code that does something simple but in a complex way.

correctness.title: Correctness
correctness.description: Code that is outright wrong or useless.

nursery.title: Nursery
nursery.description: New lints that are still under development.

pedantic.title: Pedantic
pedantic.description: Lints which are rather strict or have occasional false positives.

perf.title: Perf
perf.description: Code that can be written to run faster.

restriction.title: Restriction
restriction.description: Lints which prevent the use of Cargo features.

style.title: Style
style.description: Code that should be written in a more idiomatic way.

suspicious.title: Suspicious
suspicious.description: Code that is most likely wrong or useless.

priority.description: The priority that controls which lints or lint groups override other lint groups. Lower (particularly negative) numbers have lower priority, being overridden by higher numbers, and show up first on the command-line to tools like rustc.

LintLevel.title: Lint Level
LintLevel.description: Specify the lint level for a lint or lint group.
